{{CargoOrgan
|name=Merman King's Fin
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10691
|idx=49
|description=Its sleek and resilient skin grants formidable defense. Finned edges aid in fluid, silent movement — ghostlike and unpredictable, it appears and vanishes like a haunting specter…
|skill=Blessed by the Mermaid, dealing DMG equal to 181.6% of ATK, and increase next round's Dodge Rate by 21%!
|hp=1828
|def=302
|atk=189
|rush=171
|gene1=Per organ awakened, {race} DEF +5
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene2=Water DMG +90
|gene3=Ignore Water RES +90
|gene4=Break RES +3%
|gene5=In Snail Arena, CRIT +15%
|gene7=Water DMG +270 (Awakened)
|}}
